text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 74 

GAP_DAYS_MOPP_OS 

LABEL: Gap Mail Order Preferred Pharmacy — days in other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 3- 
months) on this tier, when using mail order preferred pharmacy (MOPP) during the coverage gap 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_MOPP_OS
